name: 38_Object_Tracking_Siamese_OTB50_DL
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kufuatilia vitu kwa kutumia mtandao wa Siamese na seti ya data ya OTB50. Seti ya data ya OTB50 inapaswa kupakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Mfumo unapaswa kujumuisha hatua za kuongeza data kama vile mzunguko na kupanua, zinazofanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza mtandao wa Siamese katika `src/model.py`. Hyperparameters, kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi, zinapaswa kurekebishwa katika `src/train.py`. Matokeo ya ufuatiliaji yanapaswa kuhifadhiwa kama `results/tracking_results.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya ufuatiliaji kwa kutumia OpenCV na hifadhi video za ufuatiliaji chini ya `results/videos/`. Zaidi ya hayo, tengeneza ripoti kamili ya Markdown inayojumuisha maelezo ya usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya modeli, na mchakato wa tathmini na ihifadhi kama `results/object_tracking_report.md`. Hakikisha mfumo unaweza kushughulikia mfuatano mpya wa video kwa marekebisho madogo kwa matumizi rahisi. Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha sehemu inayochambua athari za hyperparameters tofauti kwenye utendaji wa ufuatiliaji.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "OTB50" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Kuongeza data, kama vile mzunguko na kupanua, kunafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Hyperparameters, kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi, zinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.
Matokeo ya ufuatiliaji yanaonyeshwa kwa kutumia OpenCV na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/videos/`.
Hati ya kina ya Markdown inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya modeli, na michakato ya tathmini inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/object_tracking_report.md`.
Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha sehemu inayochambua athari za hyperparameters tofauti kwenye utendaji wa ufuatiliaji.

preferences.criteria: Video za ufuatiliaji zinapaswa kuhifadhiwa katika azimio la juu na kujumuisha maelezo yanayoonyesha kitu kinachofuatiliwa.
Hakikisha mfumo una uwezo wa kushughulikia mfuatano mpya wa video kwa marekebisho madogo, kuruhusu matumizi rahisi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "OTB50" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` that returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and a `KEYWORDS = ["OTB50"]` marker. There is no download logic, no URL, no filesystem fetch/extract code, and the trajectory evidence explicitly says there is no verified evidence that OTB50 was downloaded.

judge_stats.criteria: Kuongeza data, kama vile mzunguko na kupanua, kunafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` only contains a placeholder `build_transforms()` that returns the strings `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`, but there is no actual augmentation implementation, no transform library usage, and no evidence that rotation or scaling are applied to data.

<UNSATISFIED> `src/model.py` does not implement a Siamese network. The file only defines metadata like `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA = ["A \"Siamese\"network is implemented in \`src/model.py\`."]`, `KEYWORDS = ["Siamese"]`, and a placeholder `build_model()` that returns `"model placeholder"`. There are no neural network classes, twin branches, shared weights, or PyTorch model components showing an actual Siamese architecture.

judge_stats.criteria: Hyperparameters, kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi, zinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/train.py` does not define or tune hyperparameters like learning rate or batch size. The file only contains a minimal `train(num_steps: int = 5)` loop, a `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` string mentioning the requirement, and artifact-writing logic; there are no variables, config handling, optimizer settings, or batch-size parameters showing hyperparameter adjustment.

<SATISFIED> The workspace contains `results/tracking_results.txt`, and its content is shown as `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which confirms that tracking results were saved to the required path `results/tracking_results.txt`.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya ufuatiliaji yanaonyeshwa kwa kutumia OpenCV na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/videos/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> No code evidence shows OpenCV-based display or video saving. The provided files (`src/data_loader.py`, `src/model.py`, `src/train.py`) contain no `cv2.imshow`, `cv2.VideoWriter`, or similar OpenCV calls, and `train.py` only creates `results/tracking_results.txt` and `results/object_tracking_report.md`. The trajectory evidence also explicitly says there was no confirmed successful display window or saved video in `results/videos/`.

judge_stats.criteria: Hati ya kina ya Markdown inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya modeli, na michakato ya tathmini inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/object_tracking_report.md`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> The file `results/object_tracking_report.md` exists, but its actual content is only `('placeholder', None)`, which does not constitute a comprehensive Markdown document covering data processing, model training, and evaluation. The trajectory notes mention successful creation/saving, but they do not provide evidence that the required detailed report content was generated.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha sehemu inayochambua athari za hyperparameters tofauti kwenye utendaji wa ufuatiliaji.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> The provided evidence does not show any Markdown report content analyzing how different hyperparameters affect tracking performance. `src/train.py` only lists the requirement text `"Hyperparameters, such as learning rate and batch size, are tuned"` and creates `results/object_tracking_report.md` with the placeholder text `'generated by minimal semantic train.py\n'`, which is not an analysis section. No actual report contents, experiment results, or hyperparameter comparison are provided.
